home.title: Your Journal
home.emptySubtitle:
Write down what she likes or dislikes
at each restaurant. We'll remind you next time.
home.feedFilterHint: Choose what kind of posts you want to see in Home.

capture.noteColorHint: Pick the gradient you want before saving this note.
textPlaceholderVariants: Leave a tiny clue for future you...
Write one quick thing before it escapes...
Anything here worth saving for later?
capture.savedMsg: We'll remind you the next time you're here.
capture.savedLocalMsg: Your memory is saved on this device. Enable reminders to get a nudge when you return here.
capture.reminderDisclosureMsg: This app collects location data to remind you when you return to a saved place, even when the app is closed or not in use. Noto only uses this data for nearby note reminders.
capture.remindersEnabledMsg: Noto will remind you when you return to saved places.
capture.remindersUnavailableMsg: Your memory is sleeping locally. Noto needs background location and notifications to wake it up later.
capture.noLocation: Noto could not get your current location yet. Please try again in a moment.
capture.noLocationSettings: Noto needs location access to save a memory here. Open Settings to turn location access back on.
capture.noText: Leave a few words or a tiny doodle.
capture.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to take photos
capture.cameraPermissionSettingsMsg: Camera access is blocked for Noto. Open Settings to take photos.
capture.cameraUnavailableHint: The camera session may have stalled. Try again to restart the preview.
capture.cameraUnavailableTimeoutHint: The camera preview took too long to start. Try again to restart the camera session.
capture.livePhotoCaptureHint: Tap for a photo. Hold for a live photo.
capture.livePhotoCapturingHint: Release to finish the live photo.
capture.livePhotoHint: Press and hold on cards to play the motion clip.
capture.radiusPickerHint: Pick how close you need to be.
capture.promptPlaceholder: Answer in one line if you'd like
capture.photoLimitCheckingHint: Checking your free photo note limit...
capture.photoLimitCheckingMessage: We are still loading your account photo usage. Try again in a moment.
capture.photoLibraryPermissionMsg: Allow photo library access so you can import an image into this note.
capture.photoLibraryPermissionSettingsMsg: Photo library access is blocked for Noto. Open Settings to import from your library.
capture.cameraPermissionPromptMsg: Noto uses your camera so you can save photo memories.
capture.cameraPermissionBlockedMsg: Noto cannot show the camera permission sheet again right now. Open Settings to enable camera access.
capture.photoImportFailed: We could not import that photo right now.
capture.livePhotoImportFailed: We could not import that motion clip right now.
capture.stickerUnsupportedFormat: Please import a PNG, WebP, JPEG, or HEIC image.
capture.stickerFileUnavailable: Sticker file is not available on this device.
capture.stickerMissingTransparency: If you want a floating sticker, use a transparent PNG or WebP. Regular photos will import as stamps.
capture.stickerPasteHint: Tap to edit stickers. Tap + to create a sticker or stamp.
capture.addStickerHint: Choose a floating sticker or a photo stamp.
capture.stickerOptionsHint: Choose the extra sticker controls here.
capture.createStickerDescription: Lift the main subject from any photo
capture.cutStampDescription: Frame just part of a photo inside the cutter
capture.createStampDescription: Use the whole photo as a perforated stamp
capture.stampCutterHint: Drag, pinch, or use the controls to frame the part of the photo you want on the stamp.
capture.stickerCutoutUnavailable: Foreground cutout is unavailable in this app build. You can still import it as a stamp.
capture.stickerCutoutPlatformUnavailable: Foreground cutout is not available on this device yet. You can still import it as a stamp.
capture.stickerCutoutModelUnavailable: The on-device cutout model is still getting ready. Try again in a moment, or import this image as a stamp.
capture.stickerCutoutNoSubject: We could not find a clear foreground subject in that image. You can still import it as a stamp.
capture.stickerCutoutFailed: We could not isolate the subject from that image. You can still import it as a stamp.
capture.clipboardStickerReadyHint: Copied image will be added as a sticker.
capture.clipboardStickerRequiresUpdateMsg: Clipboard sticker paste needs the latest app build. Restart the iOS app after rebuilding to use this.
capture.clipboardStickerUnavailableMsg: Copy an image first, then try again.
capture.clipboardStickerPermissionDeniedMsg: This device will not let Noto read that clipboard image right now. Try copying it again, or import it from Photos instead.
capture.clipboardStickerUnsupported: We could not read that clipboard image right now.
capture.clipboardStickerStorageUnavailable: Sticker storage is unavailable on this device.
capture.clipboardStickerFailed: We could not paste that sticker right now.
capture.remindersUnavailableSettingsMsg: Background location or notifications are blocked for Noto. Open Settings to enable reminders.

map.nearbyEmpty: No nearby notes match these filters
map.filteredEmptySubtitle: Try a different filter or clear them to see everything you saved.
map.areaEmptySubtitle: Pan the map a little further, or show all your saved memories.
map.androidUnavailableTitle: Map is temporarily unavailable on Android
map.androidUnavailableSubtitle: This build skips Google Maps on Android until the API key is configured.
map.emptySubtitle: Places you save will appear here as little pins.

noteDetail.deleteMsg: This memory and its reminder will be permanently removed.
noteDetail.deleteErrorMsg: Could not delete this memory right now. Please try again.
noteDetail.deleteWarningMsg: This memory was removed from your device, but shared copies may take longer to delete.
noteDetail.editingHint: Editing mode: update your story, doodle, and spot
noteDetail.doodleEmpty: Add a tiny doodle to this memory.
noteDetail.polaroidPermissionMsg: Allow photo library access so Noto can save polaroid cards to your camera roll.
noteDetail.polaroidPermissionSettingsMsg: Photo library access is blocked for Noto. Open Settings so polaroids can be saved to your camera roll.
noteDetail.polaroidRequiresUpdateMsg: Saving polaroids needs the latest app build. Restart after rebuilding to use this feature.
noteDetail.polaroidExportFailed: Could not create the polaroid right now. Please try again.
noteDetail.updateWarningMsg: This note was updated on your device, but the shared copy could not be refreshed yet.
noteDetail.favoriteErrorMsg: Please try again in a moment.

recap.title: Memory recap
recap.subtitle: A warmer look at the places and days you saved.
recap.heroFallback: A month of little memories worth keeping.
recap.emptyBody: Try another month or save a new note to start this recap.

shared.sectionSubtitle: Invite a few friends to share and keep memories together.
shared.unavailableBody: This build does not have shared social enabled right now.
shared.signInTitle: Sign in to connect with friends
shared.signInBody: Connect your account to invite friends and flip through their shared moments.
shared.emptyFriendsBody: Send an invite link, and your friends' memories will start showing up here.
shared.emptyPostsBody: Shared memories will safely rest here as soon as either of you drops one.
shared.deleteBody: This shared post will be removed for everyone in the feed.
shared.manageBody: Invite someone once, then manage your circle here.
shared.inviteFirstBody: One invite link is all you need to start sharing notes from Home.
shared.emptyManageBody: No one is connected yet. Share an invite to get started.
shared.savedSharedBody: This note is in your journal and has been shared with your friends on Home.
shared.savedLocalOnlyBody: Your note is saved locally. Invite a friend first to share notes from Home.
shared.sharePublishFailedBody: Your note is safe in your journal, but we could not share it with your friends right now.
shared.removeFriendBody: This friend will stop seeing the moments you share from Home.
shared.joinBody: Paste an invite link to connect.
shared.joinPrompt: Paste the invite link your friend sent.
shared.joinSignInBody: Sign in to connect with this friend.
shared.joinFooterBody: We'll connect you as soon as the invite is confirmed.
shared.joinErrorBody: Paste a valid invite link to connect.
shared.joinConfirmBody: If you continue, this person will be added to your shared Home feed.
shared.joinSuccessBody: You can now share notes with this friend from Home.
shared.pushBlockedBody: Notifications are off for Noto. Open Settings if you want alerts when friends accept invites or share memories.
shared.cacheBannerBody: Live updates are unavailable right now, so Noto is showing your saved shared feed.
shared.cacheBannerBodyWithTime: Last updated {{time}}. Live updates will resume when the connection returns.
shared.offlineActionError: You are offline. Cached shared moments are still visible, but sharing actions need a connection.

settings.title: Settings
settings.clearAllMsg: Everything you saved will be permanently deleted. You cannot undo this.
settings.clearAllWarningMsg: Your memories have been cleared from this device, but shared items may take longer to delete.
settings.accountSignedOutMsg: Sign in to keep your journal safe and across all your devices.
settings.accountUnavailableMsg: Sign in is currently unavailable, but your memories are resting safely on this device.
settings.autoSyncOnDetail: Your memories will be safely kept in the cloud while you are signed in.
settings.autoSyncOffDetail: Your memories will only rest on this device until cloud backup is turned back on.
settings.autoSyncRetry: Could not back up to the cloud right now. We'll try again.
settings.syncPendingOffline: Your memories are kept safe locally and will back up when network returns.
settings.offlineReadOnly: You are currently offline. Cloud sync will continue when connection is restored.
settings.syncBlockedDetail: Some memories need your attention before they can be safely stored.
settings.syncRetryQueued: A few memories are waiting in line to be backed up again.
settings.syncDiagnosticsEmpty: Nothing new to pack up right now.
settings.syncDetail: Push your latest memories up to your account.
settings.syncSignInMsg: Connect your account before sending your memories to the cloud.
settings.syncUnavailableMsg: Cloud sync is not available in this build.
settings.syncFailedMsg: Unable to sync with the server right now. Please try again later.
settings.syncNetworkMsg: Unable to reach the server right now. Check your connection and try again.
settings.syncSessionExpiredMsg: Your sign-in session expired. Sign out and sign back in to resume sync.
settings.syncPolicyDeniedMsg: Supabase denied access to sync your notes. Apply the latest Supabase migrations or sign in again.
settings.syncSchemaOutdatedMsg: Cloud sync needs the latest server migrations. Apply the latest Supabase migrations, then try again.
settings.syncPhotoTooLargeMsg: A photo is too large to sync safely. Retake it with a lower resolution, then try again.
settings.syncBlockedRetryMsg: This note could not be synced after multiple attempts. Edit it and try again.
settings.syncQueueFailureMsg: Some notes could not be synced. Please try again after checking your photo sizes and connection.
settings.localModeDetail: This build is ready to use offline. Optional sync can be added later without changing your local notes.
settings.plusHint: Unlock unlimited photo notes, interactive hologram cards, premium finishes, and import from your library.
settings.plusHintWithLimit: Free plan includes {{count}} photo notes. Plus adds interactive hologram cards, premium finishes, and library import.
settings.plusActiveHint: Unlimited photo notes, interactive hologram cards, premium finishes, and library import are unlocked.
settings.plusUnavailable: Plus is coming soon to this build.
settings.about: So you never forget what she likes 💛
settings.privacyPolicyHint: Review how Noto handles your data and permissions.
settings.supportHint: Contact support if you need help with sign-in, sync, or account issues.
settings.accountDeletionHint: Open the external deletion page or support contact for your store listing.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage the account connected to Noto.
profile.name: Name
profile.autoSyncOn: Your memories will be safely kept in the cloud while signed in.
profile.syncRetryHint: Could not sync right now. The app will try again later.
profile.syncPendingOffline: Your memories are kept safe locally and will back up when network returns.
profile.syncBlockedHint: Some memories need your attention before they can be safely stored.
profile.syncSignedOut: Sign in to keep your journal safe and across all your devices.
profile.syncHint: Go to Settings to push your local memories up to the cloud.
profile.signedOutMsg: Sign in to keep your journal safe and across all your devices.
profile.unavailableMsg: Sign in is currently unavailable, but your memories are resting safely on this device.
profile.logoutConfirmMsg: Your memories are safely stored. You can sign back in anytime.
profile.logoutFailed: Could not sign out right now. Please try again later.
profile.deleteAccountUnavailable: Please sign in to delete this account.
profile.deleteAccountNotReady: Account deletion is currently unavailable. Please contact support.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMsg: This will permanently close your journal and erase your cloud data, shared posts, invites, and memories attached to this account. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountFailed: We could not delete your account right now. Please try again in a moment.
profile.deleteAccountNeedsSupportMsg: This build could not finish the deletion automatically. You can continue from our deletion page or contact support.
profile.deleteAccountRecentSignIn: For your security, sign out and sign back in before deleting this account.
profile.deleteAccountSuccessMsg: Your Noto account and synced data have been deleted from this device and the cloud.

auth.title: Noto
auth.subtitle: So you never forget
auth.shareSubtitle: Sign in to share this memory
auth.landingHint: Choose how you want to keep your journal safe and in sync across devices.
auth.emailDescription: Sign in to automatically keep your journal safe and up to date.
auth.emailShareDescription: Sign in to share this memory.
auth.registerDescription: Keep your memories securely backed up and synced everywhere.
auth.resetDescription: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.
auth.offlineBody: Sign-in and account recovery need a connection. You can still keep using local mode.
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.resetPasswordSent: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: Unable to send a reset link right now.
auth.signUpFailed: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again later.
auth.validationPasswordLength: Use at least 6 characters for your password.
auth.validationDisplayNameLength: Use 40 characters or fewer for your name.
auth.validationPrivacyConsent: Accept the privacy policy before creating your account.
auth.validationLandingPolicy: Accept the privacy policy before continuing.
auth.validationLocalPolicy: Review and accept the privacy policy before continuing in local mode.
auth.localPolicyConsentPrefix: I understand how local mode handles my data and I agree to the
auth.unavailablePlatform: Account sign-in is unavailable on this platform in the current build.
auth.unavailableFirebase: Account sign-in is unavailable right now.
auth.unavailableGeneric: Account sign-in is unavailable right now.
auth.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is unavailable right now.
auth.errorWrongCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
auth.errorEmailInUse: That email is already being used by another account.
auth.errorWeakPassword: Choose a password with at least 6 characters.
auth.errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts right now. Please try again in a bit.
auth.errorNetwork: Check your connection and try again.
auth.errorProviderConflict: This email is already linked to a different sign-in method.
auth.errorPlayServices: Google Play Services are unavailable on this device.
auth.errorGoogleConfig: Google sign-in is not configured correctly for this build yet. Check the Android package name and SHA fingerprint, or the iOS URL scheme and client IDs.
auth.errorMissingGoogleToken: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again later.
auth.devModeMsg: Google sign-in in this build only stores your account on this device. Cloud sync can be connected later.
auth.localModeMsg: This build defaults to local-only mode. You can still save memories without an account.
auth.signInFailed: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again later.

onboarding.subtitle1:
Write it down before you forget!
Noto helps you remember her food preferences at every restaurant.
onboarding.subtitle2: Next time you return to that restaurant, you'll get a reminder with your notes right on time.
onboarding.subtitle3: Because remembering no onions in her phở is how you say "I love you".
onboarding.notificationsSubtitle: Turn on notifications so Noto can alert you about nearby reminders and friend activity without interrupting you later.

notification.title: A memory nearby
notification.body: A little memory is waiting for you.
notification.channelDescription: Location-based reminders for the notes you saved.
notification.socialChannelDescription: Push notifications when friends interact or share moments with you.
notification.photoBody: A memory from here has awakened.
titleVariantsGeneric: Past you left a tiny clue here
You just passed an old favorite
Something you saved is waking up
textBodyVariants: A note from this place just resurfaced.
Revisit the details you wanted to remember here.
A quiet reminder from this old spot.
A small memory from here is ready when you are.
Your past self left a little secret here.
photoBodyVariants: A memory from this place is waiting for you.
A snapshot from this spot just woke up.
You left a little visual memory right here.
A familiar moment is waiting to be revisited.
This place kept an old photograph of yours.

widget.idleText: The right memory will find you when you're nearby.
widget.modePhoto: A snapshot waiting to be revisited.
widget.modeShared: A moment shared by a friend.
widget.configDescription: Resurface the notes you saved when returning to familiar places.

plus.title: Noto Plus
plus.subtitle: More room and more shimmer for the moments you want to keep.
plus.comingNote: These are planned directions for Plus, not features included in this build yet.

features.unlimitedDesc: The free plan limits you to 10 photo memories. Plus unlocks unlimited space for all your snapshots.
features.libraryDesc: Bring old moments from your camera roll into Noto and pin them to places you care about.
features.colorDesc: Unlock interactive hologram cards, RGB, and metallic finishes to make your journal stand out.
features.recapsDesc: Coming soon: look back on the places you've been with smart recaps and well-timed gentle nudges.
features.widgetsDesc: Coming soon: more layouts, favorites, and place-specific views to keep your best memories close.
features.remindersDesc: Quiet hours, softer alerts, and better control over when memories wake up.

plus.libraryMessage: Importing from your photo library requires Noto Plus.
plus.colorMessage: Interactive hologram cards, RGB, and metallic finishes are part of Noto Plus.
plus.hologramPreviewHint: Hologram finishes are ready to preview. Upgrade to Plus to save them.
plus.hologramSaveMessage: Hologram finishes are ready to preview. Upgrade to Plus to keep this card, or revert to standard finish.
plus.limitMessage: The free plan includes 10 photo memories. Plus unlocks unlimited photo storage and camera roll imports.
plus.upgradeSuccessMessage: You can now import from Photos, save unlimited photo memories, and dazzle with hologram cards.
plus.upgradeUnavailableMessage: Purchasing is not available right now. Please try again later.
plus.restoreSuccessMessage: Your Plus upgrade is now active on this device.
plus.restoreFailedMessage: Could not restore your purchases right now.
plus.offlineBody: You can continue viewing your current plan, but purchasing or restoring requires a connection.

search.discoveryBody: Start with something you saved lately or marked as a favorite.
search.errorBody: We could not search your notes right now. Please try again in a moment.

startup.databaseInitFailed: Noto could not open its local database. Please restart the app and try again.
startup.databaseResetFailed: Noto could not reset its local database. Please restart the app and try again.
startup.resetLocalDataBody: This removes memories saved only on this device so Noto can rebuild its local database.
startup.resetLocalDataHint: Reset local data only if retrying does not help. Synced content can come back after sign-in.
startup.recoveryInProgress: Trying to recover your local data...
